flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Harvard University fell 36% between 2021 and 2024 (86.3% → 55.7%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Harvard University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.6k → $61.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Harvard University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.6k → $61.7k).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Harvard University are 2% above 6-year earnings ($99.6k → $101.8k).
